name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: South Houston's TitleMax Title Loans at 1216 Spencer Hwy offers fast title loans and quick cash with convenient hours.
description_long:
Located at 1216 Spencer Hwy in South Houston, TX, this TitleMax Title Loans branch serves the local community with fast access to title-based credit. The storefront operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, closed Sundays. This South Houston location specializes in title-secured loans for residents who need immediate funds.

The South Houston branch provides same-day approval and funding for title loans and auto-backed credit options. Contact this location directly at 713-343-3945 to get a no-obligation quote, discuss your loan terms, or ask about documentation requirements. Staff are available during business hours to walk you through the application and explain all available options.

If you're a South Houston resident seeking quick cash against your vehicle title, this Spencer Hwy location offers convenient access with straightforward service. Bring a valid ID, proof of residency, and your vehicle title to get started. TitleMax processes applications efficiently to get you funded as quickly as possible.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title pledges
Keep driving your vehicle while using title as collateral
Bilingual staff available at this location
Most credit types accepted; credit score is not sole approval factor
Flexible line of credit options — withdraw all at once or over time up to limit
Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM (Mon/Fri) and Saturday availability
Both secured (title-based) and unsecured personal loan options offered
5.0/5 average Google rating with 481+ customer reviews
cons: APR rates and fee structure not disclosed on website; title loans typically carry rates 100%+ APR
Vehicle repossession risk if borrower defaults on title pledge loan
Requires clear vehicle title with no liens; limits eligibility
Unsecured lines of credit restricted to 10 specific states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Fast cash convenience comes at significantly higher cost than traditional personal loans or credit union alternatives
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs ($500-$5K range) who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Self-employed or gig workers without traditional paystubs who need emergency funding
Borrowers in Tennessee seeking in-person financial service with bilingual support
Consumers who prefer keeping vehicle access while using collateral rather than waiting for unsecured loan approval
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and cannot wait for traditional lending approval. The critical caveat is that title loans are extremely expensive emergency funding (often 100%+ APR) and carry vehicle repossession risk; borrowers should only use this product after exhausting lower-cost alternatives like credit unions, employer advances, or credit card cash advances.
services: Title pledge loans (vehicle title as collateral)
Flex line of credit (secured against vehicle title)
Online personal loan application and management
In-store personal loan application and management
meta_description: South Houston, TX TitleMax Title Loans at 1216 Spencer Hwy. Fast title loans with same-day funding available.
